PowerShell(Add-Type -TypeDefinition 'using System; using System.Runtime.InteropServices; public static class SPI { [DllImport\("user32.dll", SetLastError=true\)] public static extern bool SystemParametersInfo\(uint uiAction, uint uiParam, ref bool pvParam, uint fWinIni\); }'; $val = $false; [void][SPI]::SystemParametersInfo\(0x1042, 0, [ref]$val, 0\); if \($val\) { 'Windows animation effects: ON \(not the cause\)' } else { 'Windows animation effects: OFF - this is the cause' })

PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch {}; node -e "try{require.resolve\('playwright'\);console.log\('playwright: local'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('playwright: none'\)}"; node -e "try{require.resolve\('puppeteer'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('puppeteer: none'\)}")

PowerShell($out = "$env:TEMP\\login-shots"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $out | Out-Null; & "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe" --headless --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1023,454 --virtual-time-budget=8000 --screenshot="$out\\short-wide.png" "http://localhost:5174/wedding-website/" | Out-Null; Test-Path "$out\\short-wide.png")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\login-shots\\phone-tall.png"\); $x = [int]\($bmp.Width/2\); $top = -1; $bot = -1; for \($y = 0; $y -lt $bmp.Height; $y++\) { $p = $bmp.GetPixel\($x, $y\); $lum = \($p.R + $p.G + $p.B\) / 3; if \($lum -lt 150\) { if \($top -lt 0\) { $top = $y }; $bot = $y } }; "width=$\($bmp.Width\) height=$\($bmp.Height\) darkTop=$top darkBottom=$bot archHeight=$\($bot-$top\)"; $bmp.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\login-shots\\phone-tall.png"\); $x = [int]\($bmp.Width/2\); $runs = @\(\); $start = -1; for \($y = 0; $y -lt $bmp.Height; $y++\) { $p = $bmp.GetPixel\($x, $y\); $lum = \($p.R + $p.G + $p.B\) / 3; $dark = $lum -lt 190; if \($dark -and $start -lt 0\) { $start = $y }; if \(-not $dark -and $start -ge 0\) { if \(\($y - $start\) -gt 4\) { $runs += "{0}-{1} \(h={2}\)" -f $start, \($y-1\), \($y-$start\) }; $start = -1 } }; if \($start -ge 0\) { $runs += "$start-end" }; $runs -join "`n"; $bmp.Dispose\(\))
